title: Hypoporum nutans
taxonomy: Hypoporum nutans is classified within the family Hypororidae, which is a group of mosses. It belongs to the class Bryopsida, also known as the leafy liverworts, and is part of the order Calobryales. The family Hypororidae is a unique and distinct group of liverworts. Hypoporum nutans is further classified into the genus Hypoporum, which is characterized by its unique morphology and growth habits. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species within the larger group of liverworts.
